identifying_variation: randomized race-coded names on otherwise similar resumes
identifies: audit evidence on employer beliefs and differential treatment

identifying_variation: foreign name, foreign credential, and local experience signals vary across resumes

identifies: network evidence on referrals, insurance, and occupation persistence

identifying_variation: randomized collaborative or adversarial contact across caste groups
identifies: contact experiment evidence on integration design
diagnostic_caution: Identifies the designed interaction, not the full hierarchy system.

identifies: historical or public-rule evidence on state action
diagnostic_caution: May require additional evidence for persistence and private-market spillovers.

identifying_variation: race and gender barriers to occupations decline over time
identifies: macro framework for occupational barriers and talent allocation
diagnostic_caution: Depends on assumptions about talent distributions, barriers, and equilibrium wages.

identifying_variation: intergroup position and possessions reproduce inequality across domains
diagnostic_caution: Frames mechanisms but does not itself supply a single causal estimate.
